title: GridStatus NYISO Interface Limits And Flows 5 Min
description:
Transfer Limits and five-minute flows for both internal NYISO interfaces and external tie flows between NYISO and HQ, IESO, PJM, and ISO-NE. Positive values indicate imports and negative values indicate exports. 

Interfaces by neighboring region:

- Hydro-Québec (HQ):
    - SCH - HQ - NY
    - SCH - HQ_CEDARS
    - SCH - HQ_IMPORT_EXPORT
- PJM
    - SCH - PJ - NY
    - SCH - PJM_HTP
    - SCH - PJM_NEPTUNE
    - SCH - PJM_VFT
- ISO-New England
    - SCH - NE - NY
    - SCH - NPX_1385
    - SCH - NPX_CSC
- IESO
    - SCH - OH - NY
- NYISO Internal Interfaces
    - CENTRAL EAST - VC
    - DYSINGER EAST
    - MOSES SOUTH
    - SPR/DUN-SOUTH
    - TOTAL EAST
    - UPNY CONED
    - WEST CENTRAL
